name: Sphera ESG & Operational Risk Platform API
what_it_does: Sphera REST API for integrated ESG and operational risk management platform. Enables AI agents to manage environmental emissions monitoring and reporting data for air, water, and waste compliance, handle Scope 1, 2, and 3 GHG emissions calculation and GHG Protocol reporting, access process safety management and PSM compliance data for chemical and industrial operations, retrieve product stewardship and chemical compliance data for regulatory reporting, manage sustainability KPI tracking and ESG disclosure for GRI, SASB, and TCFD reporting, handle occupational health and safety incident tracking and OSHA compliance, access supply chain sustainability and lifecycle assessment data, retrieve energy management and efficiency tracking for ISO 50001 compliance, manage corporate sustainability goal-setting and progress reporting, and integrate ESG data with ERP, SAP S/4HANA, and regulatory reporting platforms.
use_cases: Calculating and reporting GHG emissions from sustainability agents
Monitoring process safety compliance from industrial safety agents
Generating ESG disclosures from reporting automation agents
Tracking environmental permit compliance from EHSQ agents
not_for: Simple carbon footprint calculators without enterprise operations and process safety focus
Consumer sustainability apps without enterprise EHSQ and regulatory compliance
Financial ESG without operational environmental and safety management
best_when: An industrial company, manufacturer, or enterprise using Sphera wants AI agents to automate environmental compliance monitoring, GHG reporting, process safety management, ESG disclosure, and SAP ERP integration.
avoid_when: REGULATORY RISK: Environmental compliance data automation must comply with EPA, OSHA, and state environmental regulations — automated permit reporting errors can trigger enforcement actions. Process safety management data is life-safety critical; automated changes to PSM procedures require engineering and HSE review. EHSQ incident data contains sensitive worker information requiring strict privacy controls.

auth.notes: Sphera uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-organization API credentials. Developer portal at developer.sphera.com. Strong SAP integration (Sphera was formerly SAP Environment, Health, and Safety Management). No native webhooks — polling-based data retrieval. Multi-lingual and multi-regulatory framework support. Acquired by Blackstone (2016) from SAP. ISO 50001, ISO 14001 compliance support.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; modules (EHS, product stewardship, sustainability) separately priced
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 1993. Private (Blackstone portfolio). Enterprise ESG and operational risk market. 10,000+ customers. Strong in chemical, oil & gas, manufacturing, and utilities. Formerly SAP EHS software (spun out 2016). Global regulatory framework coverage (EPA, REACH, GHS). Competes with Enablon and Intelex for enterprise EHSQ market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RISK: Environmental permit reporting automation must be validated against regulatory requirements; errors trigger EPA/OSHA enforcement; require HSE professional review
SAP integration heritage — Sphera has deep SAP ERP integration; leveraging SAP-Sphera connector may be more reliable than direct API for SAP customers
Process safety critical — PSM data (HAZOP, PHA, MOC) is life-safety critical; automated access and modification requires engineering HSE review and change management
Multi-framework complexity — supporting GHG Protocol, GRI, SASB, TCFD, and regional regulations simultaneously requires careful data mapping; validate framework alignment
Module-specific APIs — EHS, product stewardship, and sustainability modules have separate data models; verify which module applies to your use case
Data quality for emissions — GHG calculations require accurate activity data from operations; automated calculation quality depends on source data accuracy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise EHSQ and ESG. SOC2, ISO27001, ISO14001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Environmental compliance and operational safety data.

security_score_components.security_notes: EHSQ and ESG. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Environmental and safety data.
